import os, torch, time
DATA_DIR = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
print('Listing:', os.listdir(DATA_DIR))
t0=time.time()
d = torch.load(os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'val.pt'))
print('val keys', list(d.keys()), 'len', len(d['node_features']), 'time', time.time()-t0)
print('sample x', d['node_features'][0].shape, d['node_features'][0].dtype)
print('sample ei', d['edge_index'][0].shape)
print('sample ea', d['edge_attr'][0].shape)
print('sample y', d['labels'][0].shape, d['labels'][0][:5])
